MK1-Braton.tierNote: Pure mastery fodder. Replace as soon as possible.

Braton.tierNote: Mastery fodder. Braton Prime is the better option.

Paris.tierNote: Excellent with Incarnon Genesis — highest status chance of all bows in Incarnon form.

Strun.tierNote: Mastery fodder. Strun Wraith is strictly better.

Boltor.tierNote: Strong Incarnon — one of the best primary Incarnons. SS-tier slash damage.

Latron.tierNote: SS-tier Incarnon — best primary for raw stopping power. Doubles as armor-strip machine.

Torid.tierNote: SS-tier Incarnon — most popular Incarnon weapon. Excellent AoE Toxin crowd-clearing.

Miter.tierNote: S-tier Incarnon — competitor to Latron for best primary. Slightly inconsistent homing.

Soma.tierNote: Classic high-crit rifle. Solid mid-game, Soma Prime is the better investment.

Tonkor.tierNote: Decent grenade launcher but outclassed by Kuva/Tenet launchers.

Ignis.tierNote: Good early flamethrower. Ignis Wraith is strictly better in every way.

Ignis Wraith.tierNote: Best flamethrower. Wide AoE cone, strong for dense packs. Still viable in Steel Path.

Hek.tierNote: Strong early/mid shotgun. Vaykor Hek (Syndicate) is the better long-term version.

Vaykor Hek.tierNote: Strong syndicate shotgun with built-in Health Conversion proc. Solid Steel Path.

Kohm.tierNote: Unique spinup shotgun with insane multishot scaling. Good status applicator.

Amprex.tierNote: Chain lightning that hits multiple enemies. Still fun and effective with good builds.

Soma Prime.tierNote: Reliable high-crit rifle. Solid all-rounder for general content.

Braton Prime.tierNote: Balanced and reliable prime. Good for new players reaching relics.

Boltor Prime.tierNote: Once meta, now power-crept. Build for mastery and sell.

Paris Prime.tierNote: Good prime bow with Incarnon potential.

Dread.tierNote: Iconic Slash-heavy bow from Stalker. Incarnon available. Rare drop — keep once obtained.

Nataruk.tierNote: One of the best weapons in the game. Exceptional for Steel Path and Arbitrations. Do NOT sell.

Cedo.tierNote: Best-in-class status shotgun. Alt-fire slime instantly applies all status types. Essential.

Kuva Bramma.tierNote: Massive AoE bow. One of the most powerful primaries for clearing rooms in Steel Path.

Kuva Zarr.tierNote: Incredible AoE launcher. Dominant in Steel Path farming.

Kuva Ogris.tierNote: Strong Kuva launcher. Decent but outshone by Zarr and Bramma.

Kuva Kohm.tierNote: Kuva version with massive multishot. One of the best primaries for status builds.

Kuva Hind.tierNote: Below-average Kuva weapon. Farm for mastery, then release the Lich.

Kuva Chakkhurr.tierNote: Unique slug sniper-rifle hybrid. High single-shot damage and fun to use.

Kuva Tonkor.tierNote: Better than base Tonkor. Good AoE launcher for general Steel Path.

Tenet Arca Plasmor.tierNote: Huge AoE beam shotgun. Excellent in corridors and Steel Path.

Tenet Envoy.tierNote: Rocket launcher variant. Fun but niche.

Tenet Flux Rifle.tierNote: Continuous beam with innate Radiation. Solid for factions.

Phenmor.tierNote: Excellent Incarnon semi-auto rifle from Zariman. Strong crit profile.

Felarx.tierNote: Top-tier Incarnon shotgun from Zariman. Insane burst in Incarnon form.

Rubico Prime.tierNote: Best-in-class sniper. The go-to weapon for Eidolon hunts.

Lanka.tierNote: Electric sniper, primary choice for Eidolon hunting before Rubico Prime.

Proboscis Cernos.tierNote: Unique pull-and-group bow. Great crowd control utility.

Lex.tierNote: S-tier Incarnon — highest single-shot burst of all Incarnon secondaries. Guarantees Slash DoT.

Bronco.tierNote: Strong Incarnon secondary — synergizes extremely well with Secondary Enervate Arcane.

Dual Toxocyst.tierNote: SS-tier Incarnon — built-in Viral on chaining projectiles. Most satisfying high-KPM secondary.

Laetum.tierNote: S-tier Incarnon — original meta-setting Incarnon secondary. Exceptional all-rounder.

Epitaph.tierNote: Best-in-class status primer. Pairs with any high-damage weapon to destroy Steel Path.

Kuva Nukor.tierNote: Possibly the strongest secondary in the game. Chains between enemies, rapid status. Pairs perfectly with Epitaph.

Tenet Cycron.tierNote: Excellent beam secondary that chains between enemies. Top-tier status and damage.

Cyanex.tierNote: Unique auto-homing Toxin secondary. Good for new players and comfortable to use.

Atomos.tierNote: Decent chain beam for early game. Outclassed quickly.

Lex Prime.tierNote: Reliable high-damage pistol. Excellent Incarnon base.

Aklex Prime.tierNote: Dual Lex Prime. High damage, great Incarnon potential.

Euphona Prime.tierNote: Unique alt-fire slug shotgun pistol. Fun and viable.

Sepulcrum.tierNote: Strong homing secondary. Good all-rounder for mid to late game.

Catabolyst.tierNote: Unique acid-grenade secondary. Fun niche kit.

Innodem.tierNote: Best dagger Incarnon. Exceptional KPM if you master aim-glide attacks.

Kuva Brakk.tierNote: Powerful Kuva shotgun pistol. Excellent status and damage at close range.

Kuva Seer.tierNote: Below-average Kuva secondary. Farm for mastery then release.

Tenet Detron.tierNote: Shotgun pistol with solid status. Good Sister weapon.

Tenet Spirex.tierNote: Unique bouncing projectile secondary. Fun but situational.

Aksomati Prime.tierNote: High fire rate dual pistols. Strong crit profile.

Pyrana Prime.tierNote: Shotgun pistol that clones itself on kill. Satisfying and strong.

Skana.tierNote: Starter sword. Mastery fodder, though it has an Incarnon adapter.

Paracesis.tierNote: Unique extra mod capacity + designed to fight Sentients. Cannot be traded. Do NOT sell.

Stropha.tierNote: Top-tier gunblade. Exceptional damage with gunblade shots. One of the best melee weapons.

Nami Solo.tierNote: Best machete Incarnon. Full Follow-Through lets it shred clumped enemies.

Glaive.tierNote: Unique thrown melee. Good Incarnon. Fun utility weapon.

Nikana.tierNote: Used as crafting component for Dragon Nikana. Keep until you have it.

Dragon Nikana.tierNote: Great nikana. Solid endgame sword, Incarnon potential.

Nikana Prime.tierNote: Top-tier nikana. High damage and crit, excellent modding platform.

Lesion.tierNote: Strong Toxin/Status polearm. Good for applying status in Steel Path.

Hate.tierNote: Iconic Stalker scythe with Incarnon. Rare drop — keep once obtained.

Broken War.tierNote: Quest reward sword. Unique unobtainable without replaying quest. Keep.

War.tierNote: All parts drop from Stalker. Very rare. Strong heavy blade.

Kronen Prime.tierNote: Best-in-class tonfa. Blood Rush monster with highest-in-class crit chance.

Galatine Prime.tierNote: Massive heavy blade. Huge cleave and strong damage.

Orthos Prime.tierNote: Excellent polearm with great reach. Strong all-rounder.

Gram Prime.tierNote: Powerful heavy blade. Strong crit and status.

Reaper Prime.tierNote: High damage scythe with Incarnon potential.

Zaw (general).tierNote: Custom Zaw builds can rival or exceed most melee. Invest in one.

Garuda's Talons.tierNote: High Slash proc. Only usable on Garuda. Fun and effective in her kit.

Orvius.tierNote: Unique quest reward glaive. Cannot be easily replaced. Keep for collection.

Tatsu.tierNote: Unique blade-and-whip that generates Sentient Shields. Fun team support.

Tatsu Prime.tierNote: Prime version with better stats. Solid support melee.

Tenet Exec.tierNote: Powerful Tenet heavy blade. Strong all-rounder.

Tenet Agendus.tierNote: Hammer with unique shield-charging mechanic. Top-tier burst damage.

Kuva Shildeg.tierNote: Solid Kuva hammer. Good damage and reach.
